title: Senior Accounts Associate
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Manage a portfolio of clients and be responsible for the full spectrum of accounting services, including GL, inventories, AR and AP functions
  • Record and review accounting transactions, analyse financial information, and prepare monthly/quarterly/yearly management accounts with supporting schedules
  • Perform month-end closing activities, including accruals, prepayments, depreciation and balance sheet reconciliations
  • Prepare monthly bank reconciliations and follow up on reconciling items in a timely manner
  • Prepare unaudited financial statements in accordance with SFRS
  • Prepare Singapore GST returns and support tax compliance matters (e.g., schedules and information required for tax filings)
  • Coordinate with external parties including external auditors, tax agents, corporate secretarial firms and relevant government authorities, where required
  • Maintain proper documentation and ensure workpapers are complete, accurate, and audit-ready
  • Support ad-hoc assignments as needed, including preparation of XBRL financial statements

Key Requirements

  • Diploma/Degree in Accountancy or relevant professional qualifications (e.g., ACCA/CPA or equivalent)
  • Minimum 2–5 years relevant accounting experience; experience handling multiple clients/portfolio (accounting firm background preferred)
  • Strong knowledge of accounting fundamentals and hands-on experience preparing management accounts and financial statements
  • Proficient in MS Office (especially Excel); working experience with accounting systems is required (e.g., Xero, QuickBooks, or similar)
  • Comfortable working independently, managing priorities, and meeting deadlines with minimal supervision (with guidance from the Manager when needed)
  • Strong attention to detail, good analytical skills, and the ability to resolve discrepancies independently
  • Good interpersonal and communication skills; able to liaise professionally with clients and external stakeholders
  • Proactive, organised, and able to perform in a fast-paced environment

postedCompany.description:
Impetus Group is an established chartered accounting firm in Singapore and a trusted partner to clients seeking audit, accounting, tax, advisory and managed technology services. We offer a comprehensive range of business services designed to support companies and entrepreneurs throughout their growth and evolution.

From accounting, tax and corporate secretarial solutions to specialist services such as valuation, due diligence, sustainability consulting and IT, our team brings deep expertise, extensive industry experience and sharp business acumen to deliver the essential support that our clients need to succeed.
postedCompany.name: IMPETUS ADVISORY & OUTSOURCING PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
